name: get_yearly_nilm_consumption_breakdown
description: Retrieve yearly electricity consumption breakdown by appliance or usage category for a home using Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM) analysis to identify individual appliance or device-level consumption patterns for annual analysis

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve yearly NILM consumption data

month.description: The month parameter used in the API request (e.g., 3 for March)

year.description: The year for which to retrieve yearly consumption breakdown (e.g., 2026)
